mysql.code: // Pas de modèle Prisma associé

model AccountingQuarter {
id               String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("accounting_quarter_id")
  accountingYearId String    @map("accounting_year_id")
  name             String    @map("accounting_quarter_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  monthStartDate   DateTime  @map("accounting_month_start_date") @db.Date
  endDate          DateTime  @map("accounting_quarter_end_date") @db.Date
  isActive         Boolean   @default(true) @map("accounting_quarter_is_active")
  createdAt        DateTime  @default(now()) @map("accounting_quarter_created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime  @updatedAt @map("accounting_quarter_updated_at")
  deletedAt        DateTime? @map("accounting_quarter_deleted_at")

  accountingYear AccountingYear @relation(fields: [accountingYearId], references: [id])

  @@index([accountingYearId])
  @@map("accounting_quarters")
}

model AccountingYear {
id        String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("accounting_year_id")
  name      String    @map("accounting_year_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  startDate DateTime  @map("accounting_year_start_date") @db.Date
  endDate   DateTime  @map("accounting_year_end_date") @db.Date
  isActive  Boolean   @default(true) @map("accounting_year_is_active")
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("accounting_year_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("accounting_year_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("accounting_year_deleted_at")

  quarters AccountingQuarter[]
  balances Balance[]

  @@map("accounting_years")
}

model Activity {
id         String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("activity_id")
  userId     String    @map("user_id")
  title      String    @map("activity_title")
  styleClass String    @map("activity_class")
  icon       String    @map("activity_icon")
  desc       String    @map("activity_desc")
  meta       Json      @map("activity_meta")
  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now()) @map("activity_created_at")
  updatedAt  DateTime  @updatedAt @map("activity_updated_at")
  deletedAt  DateTime? @map("activity_deleted_at")

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([userId])
  @@map("activities")
}

POST /app-meta
GET /app-meta
GET /app-meta/by-key/:key
GET /app-meta/:id
PATCH /app-meta/:id
DELETE /app-meta/:id

mysql.code:
model AppMeta {
id        Int       @id @default(autoincrement()) @map("meta_id")
  key       String    @unique @map("meta_key") @db.VarChar(255)
  value     String    @map("meta_value") @db.VarChar(255)
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("meta_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("meta_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("meta_deleted_at")

  @@map("meta")
}

model User {
id         String @id @default(uuid()) @map("user_id")
  roleId     String @map("role_id")
  countryId  String @map("country_id")
  regionId   String @map("region_id")
  languageId String @map("language_id")
  genderId   String @map("gender_id")

  firstName String  @map("user_first_name")
  lastName  String  @map("user_last_name")
  email     String  @unique @map("user_email")
  phone     String  @map("user_phone")
  address   String  @map("user_address")
  password  String  @map("user_password")
  avatar    String  @map("user_avatar")
  isActive  Boolean @default(true) @map("user_is_active")

  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("user_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("user_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("user_deleted_at")

  /// Optional: add column `user_refresh_token` TEXT if missing from base DDL (JWT refresh).
  refreshToken String?   @map("user_refresh_token") @db.Text
  /// Optional: add column `user_last_login_at` TIMESTAMP NULL if missing from base DDL.
  lastLoginAt  DateTime? @map("user_last_login_at")

  role     Role     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id])
  country  Country  @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])
  region   Region   @relation(fields: [regionId], references: [id])
  language Language @relation(fields: [languageId], references: [id])
  gender   Gender   @relation(fields: [genderId], references: [id])

  companies     Company[]
  clients       Client[]
  activities    Activity[]
  notifications Notification[]

  @@index([roleId])
  @@index([email])
  @@map("users")
}

model Balance {
id               String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("balance_id")
  accountingYearId String    @map("accounting_year_id")
  clientId         String    @map("client_id")
  startDate        DateTime  @map("balance_start_date") @db.Date
  endDate          DateTime  @map("balance_end_date") @db.Date
  isActive         Boolean   @default(true) @map("balance_is_active")
  createdAt        DateTime  @default(now()) @map("balance_created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime  @updatedAt @map("balance_updated_at")
  deletedAt        DateTime? @map("balance_deleted_at")

  accountingYear AccountingYear @relation(fields: [accountingYearId], references: [id])
  client         Client         @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
  lines          BalanceLine[]

  @@index([accountingYearId])
  @@index([clientId])
  @@map("balances")
}

model BalanceLine {
id              String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("balance_line_id")
  balanceId       String    @map("balance_id")
  number          String    @map("balance_line_number") @db.VarChar(255)
  name            String    @map("balance_line_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  previousSold    Decimal   @map("balance_line_previous_sold") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  previousIsDebit Boolean   @default(false) @map("balance_line_previous_is_debit")
  debit           Decimal   @map("balance_line_debit") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  credit          Decimal   @map("balance_line_credit") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currentSold     Decimal   @map("balance_line_current_sold") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currentIsDebit  Boolean   @default(false) @map("balance_line_current_is_debit")
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now()) @map("balance_line_created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt @map("balance_line_updated_at")
  deletedAt       DateTime? @map("balance_line_deleted_at")

  balance Balance @relation(fields: [balanceId], references: [id])

  @@index([balanceId])
  @@map("balance_lines")
}

mysql.code:
model Balance {
id               String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("balance_id")
  accountingYearId String    @map("accounting_year_id")
  clientId         String    @map("client_id")
  startDate        DateTime  @map("balance_start_date") @db.Date
  endDate          DateTime  @map("balance_end_date") @db.Date
  isActive         Boolean   @default(true) @map("balance_is_active")
  createdAt        DateTime  @default(now()) @map("balance_created_at")
  updatedAt        DateTime  @updatedAt @map("balance_updated_at")
  deletedAt        DateTime? @map("balance_deleted_at")

  accountingYear AccountingYear @relation(fields: [accountingYearId], references: [id])
  client         Client         @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
  lines          BalanceLine[]

  @@index([accountingYearId])
  @@index([clientId])
  @@map("balances")
}

model BalanceLine {
id              String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("balance_line_id")
  balanceId       String    @map("balance_id")
  number          String    @map("balance_line_number") @db.VarChar(255)
  name            String    @map("balance_line_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  previousSold    Decimal   @map("balance_line_previous_sold") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  previousIsDebit Boolean   @default(false) @map("balance_line_previous_is_debit")
  debit           Decimal   @map("balance_line_debit") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  credit          Decimal   @map("balance_line_credit") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currentSold     Decimal   @map("balance_line_current_sold") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  currentIsDebit  Boolean   @default(false) @map("balance_line_current_is_debit")
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now()) @map("balance_line_created_at")
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt @map("balance_line_updated_at")
  deletedAt       DateTime? @map("balance_line_deleted_at")

  balance Balance @relation(fields: [balanceId], references: [id])

  @@index([balanceId])
  @@map("balance_lines")
}

modules.notes: user optionnel à la création · meta bp

mysql.code:
model Client {
id          String @id @default(uuid()) @map("client_id")
  userId      String @map("user_id")
  companyId   String @map("company_id")
  countryId   String @map("settings_country_id")
  regionId    String @map("settings_region_id")
  legalFormId String @map("settings_legal_form_id")

  name       String  @map("client_name")
  address    String  @map("client_address")
  postalCode String  @map("client_postal_code")
  ninea      String  @map("client_ninea")
  useTva     Boolean @default(true) @map("client_use_tva")
  meta       Json    @map("client_meta")

  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("client_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("client_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("client_deleted_at")

  user      User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  company   Company   @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])
  country   Country   @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])
  region    Region    @relation(fields: [regionId], references: [id])
  legalForm LegalForm @relation(fields: [legalFormId], references: [id])

  employees    Employee[]
  tiers        Tier[]
  balances     Balance[]
  rentals      Rental[]
  opTurnovers  OpTurnover[]

  @@index([companyId])
  @@index([userId])
  @@map("clients")
}

model Company {
id          String @id @default(uuid()) @map("company_id")
  userId      String @map("user_id")
  countryId   String @map("country_id")
  regionId    String @map("region_id")
  legalFormId String @map("legal_form_id")

  name      String  @map("company_name")
  email     String  @map("company_email")
  phone     String  @map("company_phone")
  address   String  @map("company_address")
  ninea     String  @map("company_ninea")
  useTva    Boolean @default(true) @map("company_use_tva")
  reference String  @map("company_reference")
  meta      Json    @map("company_meta")

  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("company_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("company_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("company_deleted_at")

  user      User       @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])
  country   Country    @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])
  region    Region     @relation(fields: [regionId], references: [id])
  legalForm LegalForm  @relation(fields: [legalFormId], references: [id])
  clients   Client[]
  documents Document[]

  @@index([userId])
  @@map("companies")
}

model ContractType {
id       String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("settings_contract_type_id")
  name     String  @map("settings_contract_type_name")
  code     String  @map("settings_contract_type_code")
  isActive Boolean @default(true) @map("settings_contract_type_is_active")

  employeeContractTypes EmployeeContractType[]

  @@map("settings_contract_types")
}

model Country {
id          String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("country_id")
  currencyId  String  @map("currency_id")
  name        String  @map("country_name")
  code        String  @map("country_code")
  tva         Float   @map("country_tva")
  callingCode String  @map("country_calling_code")
  isActive    Boolean @default(true) @map("country_is_active")

  currency  Currency   @relation(fields: [currencyId], references: [id])
  regions   Region[]
  languages Language[]
  users          User[]
  companies      Company[]
  clients        Client[]
  opImportations OpImportation[]
  opExportations OpExportation[]

  @@index([currencyId])
  @@map("settings_countries")
}

mysql.code:
model Currency {
id       String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("currency_id")
  name     String  @map("currency_name")
  code     String  @map("currency_code")
  isActive Boolean @default(true) @map("currency_is_active")

  countries Country[]

  @@map("settings_currencies")
}

model DeductionType {
id        String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("deduction_type_id")
  code      String    @map("deduction_type_code") @db.VarChar(255)
  name      String    @map("deduction_type_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  isActive  Boolean   @default(true) @map("deduction_type_is_active")
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("deduction_type_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("deduction_type_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("deduction_type_deleted_at")

  localPurchases OpLocalPurchase[]
  importations   OpImportation[]

  @@map("deduction_types")
}

model DocumentCategory {
id        String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("document_category_id")
  name      String    @map("document_category_name")
  code      String    @map("document_category_code")
  isActive  Boolean   @default(true) @map("document_category_is_active")
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("document_category_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("document_category_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("document_category_deleted_at")

  documents Document[]

  @@map("document_categories")
}

model Document {
id         String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("document_id")
  categoryId String    @map("category_id")
  /// Set on create; column is nullable in DB so migrations can run before companies exist.
  companyId  String?   @map("company_id")
  name       String    @map("document_name")
  path       String    @map("document_path")
  mimeType   String    @map("document_type")
  size       Float     @map("document_size")
  meta       Json      @map("document_meta")
  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now()) @map("document_created_at")
  updatedAt  DateTime  @updatedAt @map("document_updated_at")
  deletedAt  DateTime? @map("document_deleted_at")

  category DocumentCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  company  Company?         @relation(fields: [companyId], references: [id])

  @@index([categoryId])
  @@index([companyId])
  @@map("documents")
}

mysql.code:
model EmployeeContractType {
id             String @id @default(uuid()) @map("employee_contract_type_id")
  contractTypeId String @map("contract_type_id")
  employeeId     String @map("employee_id")

  startDate DateTime @map("employee_contract_type_start_date")
  endDate   DateTime @map("employee_contract_type_end_date")
  jobTitle  String   @map("employee_contract_type_job_title")
  salary    Float?   @map("employee_contract_type_salary")
  isManager Boolean  @default(false) @map("employee_contract_type_is_manager")
  isActive  Boolean  @default(true) @map("employee_contract_type_is_active")

  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("employee_contract_type_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("employee_contract_type_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("employee_contract_type_deleted_at")

  contractType ContractType @relation(fields: [contractTypeId], references: [id])
  employee     Employee     @relation(fields: [employeeId], references: [id])

  @@index([contractTypeId])
  @@index([employeeId])
  @@map("employee_contract_types")
}

mysql.code:
model Employee {
id                   String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("employee_id")
  clientId             String  @map("client_id")
  identificationTypeId String? @map("identification_type_id")

  firstName String  @map("employee_first_name")
  lastName  String  @map("employee_last_name")
  email     String  @map("employee_email")
  phone     String  @map("employee_phone")
  address   String  @map("employee_address")
  isActive  Boolean @default(true) @map("employee_is_active")

  socialInsuranceNumber String? @map("employee_insurance_number")
  identityNumber        String? @map("employee_identity_number")

  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("employee_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("employee_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("employee_deleted_at")

  client                Client                 @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
  identificationType    IdentificationType?    @relation(fields: [identificationTypeId], references: [id])
  employeeContractTypes EmployeeContractType[]

  @@index([clientId])
  @@index([identificationTypeId])
  @@map("employees")
}

model Gender {
id       String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("gender_id")
  name     String  @map("gender_name")
  code     String  @map("gender_code")
  isActive Boolean @default(true) @map("gender_is_active")

  users User[]

  @@map("settings_genders")
}

model IdentificationType {
id       String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("identification_type_id")
  name     String  @map("identification_type_name")
  code     String  @map("identification_type_code")
  isActive Boolean @default(true) @map("identification_type_is_active")

  employees Employee[]

  @@map("settings_identification_type")
}

model Language {
id        String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("language_id")
  countryId String  @map("country_id")
  name      String  @map("language_name")
  code      String  @map("language_code")
  isActive  Boolean @default(true) @map("language_is_active")

  country Country @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])
  users   User[]

  @@index([countryId])
  @@map("settings_languages")
}

model LegalForm {
id       String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("legal_form_id")
  name     String  @map("legal_form_name")
  code     String  @map("legal_form_code")
  isActive Boolean @default(true) @map("legal_form_is_active")

  companies Company[]
  clients   Client[]

  @@map("settings_legal_forms")
}

model Notification {
id         String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("notification_id")
  userId     String    @map("user_id")
  title      String    @map("notification_title")
  desc       String    @map("notification_desc") @db.Text
  styleClass String    @map("notification_class")
  icon       String    @map("notification_icon")
  isRead     Boolean   @default(false) @map("notification_is_read")
  link       String    @map("notification_link")
  meta       Json      @map("notification_meta")
  createdAt  DateTime  @default(now()) @map("notification_created_at")
  updatedAt  DateTime  @updatedAt @map("notification_updated_at")
  deletedAt  DateTime? @map("notification_deleted_at")

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id])

  @@index([userId])
  @@map("notifications")
}

model OpExemption {
id        String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("op_exemption_id")
  tierId    String    @map("tier_id")
  code      String    @map("op_exemption_code") @db.VarChar(255)
  month     Int       @map("op_exemption_month")
  year      Int       @map("op_exemption_year")
  amount    Decimal   @map("op_exemption_amount") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  desc      String    @map("op_exemption_desc") @db.Text
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("op_exemption_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("op_exemption_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("op_exemption_deleted_at")

  tier Tier @relation(fields: [tierId], references: [id])

  @@index([tierId])
  @@map("op_exemptions")
}

GET /op-exportations

PATCH /op-exportations/:id
DELETE /op-exportations/:id

mysql.code:
model OpExportation {
id           String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("op_exportation_id")
  tierId       String    @map("tier_id")
  countryId    String    @map("settings_country_id")
  code         String    @map("op_exportation_code") @db.VarChar(255)
  month        Int       @map("op_exportation_month")
  year         Int       @map("op_exportation_year")
  date         DateTime  @map("op_exportation_date") @db.Date
  net          Decimal?  @map("op_exportation_net") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  tax          Decimal?  @map("op_exportation_tax") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  taxDeduction Decimal?  @map("op_exportation_tax_deduction") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  total        Decimal?  @map("op_exportation_total") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  prorata      Decimal?  @map("op_exportation_prorata") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now()) @map("op_exportation_created_at")
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt @map("op_exportation_updated_at")
  deletedAt    DateTime? @map("op_exportation_deleted_at")

  tier    Tier    @relation(fields: [tierId], references: [id])
  country Country @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])

  @@index([tierId])
  @@index([countryId])
  @@map("op_exportations")
}

mysql.code:
model OpImportation {
id                   String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("op_importation_id")
  tierId               String    @map("tier_id")
  countryId            String    @map("settings_country_id")
  deductionTypeId      String    @map("deduction_type_id")
  propertyNatureTypeId String    @map("property_nature_type_id")
  code                 String    @map("op_importation_code") @db.VarChar(255)
  month                Int       @map("op_importation_month")
  year                 Int       @map("op_importation_year")
  date                 DateTime  @map("op_importation_date") @db.Date
  net                  Decimal?  @map("op_importation_net") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  tax                  Decimal?  @map("op_importation_tax") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  taxDeduction         Decimal?  @map("op_importation_tax_deduction") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  total                Decimal?  @map("op_importation_total") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  prorata              Decimal?  @map("op_importation_prorata") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  createdAt            DateTime  @default(now()) @map("op_importation_created_at")
  updatedAt            DateTime  @updatedAt @map("op_importation_updated_at")
  deletedAt            DateTime? @map("op_importation_deleted_at")

  tier               Tier               @relation(fields: [tierId], references: [id])
  country            Country            @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])
  deductionType      DeductionType      @relation(fields: [deductionTypeId], references: [id])
  propertyNatureType PropertyNatureType @relation(fields: [propertyNatureTypeId], references: [id])

  @@index([tierId])
  @@index([countryId])
  @@index([deductionTypeId])
  @@index([propertyNatureTypeId])
  @@map("op_importations")
}

model OpLocalPurchase {

  month                Int       @map("op_local_purchase_month")
  year                 Int       @map("op_local_purchase_year")
  net                  Decimal   @map("op_local_purchase_net") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  tax                  Decimal   @map("op_local_purchase_tax") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  taxDeduction         Decimal   @map("op_local_purchase_tax_deduction") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  total                Decimal   @map("op_local_purchase_total") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  prorata              Json      @map("op_local_purchase_prorata")

  deletedAt            DateTime? @map("op_local_purchase_deleted_at")

  tier               Tier               @relation(fields: [tierId], references: [id])
  deductionType      DeductionType      @relation(fields: [deductionTypeId], references: [id])
  propertyNatureType PropertyNatureType @relation(fields: [propertyNatureTypeId], references: [id])

mysql.code:
model Permission {
id        String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("permission_id")
  typeId    String    @map("type_id")
  name      String    @map("permission_name")
  code      String    @map("permission_code")
  isActive  Boolean   @default(true) @map("permission_is_active")
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("permission_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("permission_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("permission_deleted_at")

  type            PermissionType   @relation(fields: [typeId], references: [id])
  rolePermissions RolePermission[]

  @@index([typeId])
  @@map("permissions")
}

model PropertyNatureType {
id        String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("property_nature_type_id")
  code      String    @map("property_nature_type_code") @db.VarChar(255)
  name      String    @map("property_nature_type_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  isActive  Boolean   @default(true) @map("property_nature_type_is_active")
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("property_nature_type_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("property_nature_type_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("property_nature_type_deleted_at")

  localPurchases OpLocalPurchase[]
  importations   OpImportation[]

  @@map("property_nature_types")
}

model Region {
id        String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("region_id")
  countryId String  @map("country_id")
  name      String  @map("region_name")
  code      String  @map("region_code")
  isActive  Boolean @default(true) @map("region_is_active")

  country   Country   @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])
  users     User[]
  companies Company[]
  clients   Client[]

  @@index([countryId])
  @@map("settings_regions")
}

model RentalUsage {
id       String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("rental_usage_id")
  name     String  @map("rental_usage_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  isActive Boolean @default(true) @map("rental_usage_is_active")

  rentals Rental[]

  @@map("rental_usages")
}

model Rental {
id            String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("rental_id")
  clientId      String    @map("client_id")
  rentalUsageId String    @map("rental_usage_id")
  name          String    @map("rental_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  address       String    @map("rental_address") @db.VarChar(255)
  owner         String    @map("rental_owner") @db.VarChar(255)
  useTax        Boolean   @default(true) @map("rental_use_tax")
  value         Decimal   @map("rental_value") @db.Decimal(12, 2)
  meta          Json      @map("rental_meta")
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now()) @map("rental_created_at")
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt @map("rental_updated_at")
  deletedAt     DateTime? @map("rental_deleted_at")

  client      Client      @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])
  rentalUsage RentalUsage @relation(fields: [rentalUsageId], references: [id])

  @@index([clientId])
  @@index([rentalUsageId])
  @@map("rentals")
}

model Role {

  isActive  Boolean   @default(true) @map("role_is_active")
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("role_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("role_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("role_deleted_at")

  permissions RolePermission[]
  users       User[]

  @@map("roles")
}

model TierType {
id       String  @id @default(uuid()) @map("settings_tier_type_id")
  name     String  @map("settings_tier_type_name")
  code     String  @map("settings_tier_type_code")

entry.code:
POST /tiers
GET /tiers
GET /tiers/client/:clientId
GET /tiers/:clientId/xlsx/annual
POST /tiers/:clientId/xlsx/annual/jobs
GET /tiers/:clientId/xlsx
POST /tiers/:clientId/xlsx/jobs
GET /tiers/jobs/:jobId
GET /tiers/jobs/:jobId/download
GET /tiers/:id
PATCH /tiers/:id
DELETE /tiers/:id

mysql.code:
model Tier {
id         String @id @default(uuid()) @map("tier_id")
  tierTypeId String @map("tier_type_id")
  clientId   String @map("client_id")

  name      String  @map("tier_name")
  ninea     String  @map("tier_ninea")
  useTva    Boolean @default(true) @map("tier_use_tva")
  reference String  @map("tier_reference")
  meta      Json    @map("tier_meta")
  isActive  Boolean @default(true) @map("tier_is_active")

  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("tier_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("tier_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("tier_deleted_at")

  tierType TierType @relation(fields: [tierTypeId], references: [id])
  client   Client   @relation(fields: [clientId], references: [id])

  tiersTransactions TiersTransaction[]
  localPurchases    OpLocalPurchase[]
  suspensions       OpSuspension[]
  importations      OpImportation[]
  exportations      OpExportation[]
  retains           OpRetain[]
  royalties         OpRoyalty[]
  exemptions        OpExemption[]

  @@index([tierTypeId])
  @@index([clientId])
  @@map("tiers")
}

model TiersTransaction {
id            String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("tiers_transaction_id")
  tierId        String    @map("tier_id")
  transactionId String    @map("transaction_id")
  net           Float     @map("tiers_transaction_net")
  tax           Float     @map("tiers_transaction_tax")
  total         Float     @map("tiers_transaction_total")
  date          DateTime  @map("tiers_transaction_date") @db.Date
  createdAt     DateTime  @default(now()) @map("tiers_transaction_created_at")
  updatedAt     DateTime  @updatedAt @map("tiers_transaction_updated_at")
  deletedAt     DateTime? @map("tiers_transaction_deleted_at")

  tier Tier @relation(fields: [tierId], references: [id])

  @@index([tierId])
  @@index([transactionId])
  @@map("tiers_transactions")
}

entry.code:
POST /users
GET /users
GET /users/me
GET /users/:id
PATCH /users/me/change-password
PATCH /users/:id
PATCH /users/:id/role
DELETE /users/:id/role
DELETE /users/:id

mysql.code:
model User {
id         String @id @default(uuid()) @map("user_id")
  roleId     String @map("role_id")
  countryId  String @map("country_id")
  regionId   String @map("region_id")
  languageId String @map("language_id")
  genderId   String @map("gender_id")

  firstName String  @map("user_first_name")
  lastName  String  @map("user_last_name")
  email     String  @unique @map("user_email")
  phone     String  @map("user_phone")
  address   String  @map("user_address")
  password  String  @map("user_password")
  avatar    String  @map("user_avatar")
  isActive  Boolean @default(true) @map("user_is_active")

  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("user_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("user_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("user_deleted_at")

  /// Optional: add column `user_refresh_token` TEXT if missing from base DDL (JWT refresh).
  refreshToken String?   @map("user_refresh_token") @db.Text
  /// Optional: add column `user_last_login_at` TIMESTAMP NULL if missing from base DDL.
  lastLoginAt  DateTime? @map("user_last_login_at")

  role     Role     @relation(fields: [roleId], references: [id])
  country  Country  @relation(fields: [countryId], references: [id])
  region   Region   @relation(fields: [regionId], references: [id])
  language Language @relation(fields: [languageId], references: [id])
  gender   Gender   @relation(fields: [genderId], references: [id])

  companies     Company[]
  clients       Client[]
  activities    Activity[]
  notifications Notification[]

  @@index([roleId])
  @@index([email])
  @@map("users")
}

model Role {
id        String    @id @default(uuid()) @map("role_id")
  name      String    @map("role_name")
  code      String    @map("role_code")
  isActive  Boolean   @default(true) @map("role_is_active")
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now()) @map("role_created_at")
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt @map("role_updated_at")
  deletedAt DateTime? @map("role_deleted_at")

  permissions RolePermission[]
  users       User[]

  @@map("roles")
}
